title: Better GUI Enhanced Edition for Better Smithing Table
description: A GUI fully oriented to enhance the vanilla experience.
body:
# Alternate version for vanilla lovers. Also in dark version!
### Want a more customized version? Check this one: [Create Style!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-gui-for-better-smithing-table)
**_(Check the "images" tab for more info)_**

![Better Vanilla GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df3ed6ba65a881cc3b009ae4eec6f91808238329.png)

## Link mod!: [Better Smithing Table](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettersmithingtable)



### Can i use for my modpack?
**Sure! no problem, but I would appreciate if you could leave credits.**

### _Any questions or suggestions can be left in the Official Discord: [Discord]_
